answers: Sound design = creating the audio world of a film/game. Dialogue, music, sound effects, ambience, and Foley.
Basics: clean dialogue recording is priority #1. Bad audio ruins good video. Use a dedicated mic, not camera mic.
Key elements: diegetic sound (characters hear it), non-diegetic (score/narration), Foley (everyday sounds recreated).
Tools: Audacity (free), Adobe Audition, Pro Tools, Reaper. Freesound.org for free sound effects.
